# `unknown` is emitted as `[]byte` when `rawjson-as-bytes` is enabled

## TypeSpec

```tsp
@service(#{ title: "Raw JSON" })
namespace RawJson;

model ContainsRawJson {
  anything1: unknown;
  anything2: unknown;
}

@put
@route("/model")
op forModel(@body body: ContainsRawJson): ContainsRawJson;
```

## Emitter configuration

```yaml
rawjson-as-bytes: true
```

## The generated models

```go models
// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
// Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.
// Code generated by Microsoft (R) Go Code Generator. DO NOT EDIT.

package testmodule

type ContainsRawJSON struct {
// REQUIRED; The contents of this field are raw JSON.
	Anything1 []byte

// REQUIRED; The contents of this field are raw JSON.
	Anything2 []byte
}

```
